surface_verification.justification: Pure internal Python shared-lib relocation: resolve_main_repo_root moved from lib/events_log.py to its thematic home lib/repo_root.py plus a lazy back-compat re-export; net-zero consumer imports updated. No web/CLI/API/store/message-contract surface and no UI-consumed code (the WebUI is a separate repo and consumes none of these CLI/hook-side Python functions). Verified by the full shared unit/integration suite (3290 passed) + the cross-plugin compliance suite (46 passed, exercising the load_shared_lib re-export path) + import-cycle (all 4 first-import orders) and back-compat equivalence probes.

Back-compat: `from lib.events_log import resolve_main_repo_root` still imports and returns the same answer as lib.repo_root (lazy shim, no import cycle in any order)
Decision-drop SSoT: worktree-reachable consumers still resolve the drop dir via resolve_main_repo_root; the literal-string grep + raw-join coverage still hold after the migrated/reverted imports
